arts.ttl: ‘Definitely’: Gary Neville predicts what would’ve happened if Ollie Watkins had signed for Arsenal
arts.sum: Arsenal wanted to be busy in the January transfer window, but, unfortunately, they couldn’t get anything done. Arsenal wanted a new striker through the door...

arts.ttl: Arsenal Watkins transfer failure hands unwanted tag in grim £180m spend reminder
arts.sum: "A £40million bid to sign Aston Villa striker Ollie Watkins was rejected, while links to Bayern's Tel, Juventus' Dusan Vlahovic and Athletic Club's Nico Williams came to nothing. The swoop for the 23-year-old saw them spend the most money in a winter transfer window in recent memory - with their highest previous outlay coming in a £63million during the 2017/2018 campaign.

arts.ttl: Arsenal player appoints intermediary to negotiate Emirates exit – Gunners making renewal offer ‘not ruled out’
arts.sum: Arsenal’s Jorginho has less than six months left on his contract and Flamengo are keen on signing him this month. The winter market in the UK closed on Monday but the one in Brazil is open until the end of this month. Therefore, Flamengo are working to try and sign the midfielder in February. Last The post Arsenal player appoints intermediary to negotiate Emirates exit – Gunners making renewal offer ‘not ruled out’ appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer tells Newcastle United what they must do against Arsenal in 'twitchy' admission
arts.sum: Alan Shearer has no concerns over one key aspect of Newcastle United's Carabao Cup semi-final second-leg against Arsenal on Wednesday night - but admits he is 'very twitchy' ahead of the St James' Park showdown. However, club record goalscorer Shearer admits he's nervous about Wednesday's game, especially after United's 2-1 home defeat to Fulham on Saturday, coupled with Arsenal's 5-1 success over Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Arsenal to move for Sesko, Zubimendi
arts.sum: Arsenal will move for RB Leipzig striker Benjamin Sesko and Real Sociedad defensive midfielder Martín Zubimendi in the summer. Transfer Talk has the latest news, gossip and rumors.
